children.label: C
children.text: such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2009;

children.label: E
children.text: $35,585,871,000 for fiscal year 2019; and

children.heading: Funding for pediatric research initiative
children.label: 2 Funding for pediatric research initiative
children.text: For the purpose of carrying out , there is authorized to be appropriated to the Division of Program Coordination, Planning, and Strategic Initiatives, out of the Pediatric Research Initiative Fund described in , and in addition to amounts otherwise made available under paragraph (1) of this subsection, $12,600,000 for each of fiscal years 2024 through 2028.section 282(b)(7)(B)(ii) of this titlesection 9008 of title 26

children.heading: Office of the Director
children.label: b Office of the Director
children.text: Of the amount authorized to be appropriated under subsection (a) for a fiscal year, there are authorized to be appropriated for programs and activities under this subchapter carried out through the Office of the Director of NIH such sums as may be necessary for each of the fiscal years 2007 through 2009.

children.heading: Account
children.label: A Account
children.text: For the purpose of allocations under (relating to research identified by the Division of Program Coordination, Planning, and Strategic Initiatives), there is established an account to be known as the Common Fund.section 282(b)(7)(B)(i) of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Of the total amount appropriated under subsection (a)(1) for fiscal year 2007 or any subsequent fiscal year, the Director of NIH shall reserve an amount for the Common Fund, subject to any applicable provisions in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Minimum amount
children.label: ii Minimum amount
children.text: For each fiscal year, the percentage constituted by the amount reserved under clause (i) relative to the total amount appropriated under subsection (a)(1) for such year may not be less than the percentage constituted by the amount so reserved for the preceding fiscal year relative to the total amount appropriated under subsection (a)(1) for such preceding fiscal year, subject to any applicable provisions in appropriations Acts.

children.heading: Common Fund strategic planning report
children.label: C Common Fund strategic planning report
i
children.text: An estimate of the amounts determined by the Director of NIH to be appropriate for maximizing the potential of such research.

children.label: ii
children.text: An estimate of the amounts determined by the Director of NIH to be sufficient only for continuing to fund research activities previously identified by the Division of Program Coordination, Planning, and Strategic Initiatives.

children.label: I
children.text: that is in addition to the research activities described in clause (ii); and

children.label: II
children.text: for which there is the most substantial need.

children.heading: Evaluation
children.label: D Evaluation
children.text: During the 6-month period following the end of the first fiscal year for which the total amount reserved under subparagraph (B) is equal to 5 percent of the total amount appropriated under subsection (a)(1) for such fiscal year, the Secretary, acting through the Director of NIH, in consultation with the advisory council established under , shall submit recommendations to the Congress for changes regarding amounts for the Common Fund.section 282(k) of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: A Limitation
children.text: With respect to the total amount appropriated under subsection (a) for fiscal year 2008 or any subsequent fiscal year, if the head of a national research institute or national center fails to submit the report required by subparagraph (B) for the preceding fiscal year, the amount made available for the institute or center for the fiscal year involved may not exceed the amount made available for the institute or center for fiscal year 2006.

children.heading: Reporting
children.label: B Reporting
children.text: Not later than 2 years after , the head of each national research institute or national center shall submit to the Director of the National Institutes of Health a report, to be included in the triennial report under , on the amount made available by the institute or center for conducting or supporting research that involves collaboration between the institute or center and 1 or more other national research institutes or national centers.December 13, 2016section 283 of this title

children.heading: Determination
children.label: C Determination
children.text: For purposes of determining the amount or percentage of funds to be reported under subparagraph (B), any amounts made available to an institute or center under shall be included.section 282(b)(7)(B)(i) of this title

children.heading: Verification of amounts
children.label: D Verification of amounts
children.text: Upon receipt of each report submitted under subparagraph (B), the Director of NIH shall review and, in cases of discrepancy, verify the accuracy of the amounts specified in the report.

children.heading: Waiver
children.label: E Waiver
children.text: At the request of any national research institute or national center, the Director of NIH may waive the application of this paragraph to such institute or center if the Director finds that the conduct or support of research described in subparagraph (B) is inconsistent with the mission of such institute or center.

children.heading: Transfer authority
children.label: d Transfer authority
children.text: Of the total amount appropriated under subsection (a)(1) for a fiscal year, the Director of NIH may (in addition to the reservation under subsection (c)(1) for such year) transfer not more than 1 percent for programs or activities that are authorized in this subchapter and identified by the Director to receive funds pursuant to this subsection. In making such transfers, the Director may not decrease any appropriation account under subsection (a)(1) by more than 1 percent.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: e Rule of construction
children.text: This section may not be construed as affecting the authorities of the Director of NIH under .section 281 of this title
